articles.title: [https://bit.ly/3PAF69J]
articles.summary: TED AI [https://bit.ly/3PAF69J] is a TED event focusing on the power and impact of AI and what's next, happening on the 17th and 18th of October in San Francisco. Meet the pioneers and trailblazers shaping the future of AI — Andrew NG, Reid Hoffman, Ilya Sutskever, Stephen Wolfram, and many others

articles.title: STABILITY AI DEBUTS STABLE AUDIO
articles.summary: Stability AI has released Stable Audio, a text-to-audio generator that provides anyone with the ability to use simple text prompts to generate short audio clips.

articles.title: GOOGLE GIVES PUBLIC DATA PROJECT AN AI MAKEOVER
articles.summary: Google has launched an AI-driven interface for Data Commons, simplifying data access and analysis through natural language queries.

articles.title: COPILOT
articles.summary: Salesforce has unveiled Einstein Copilot, a conversational AI for more intuitive user queries. Enhanced with a "trust layer" for security and linked to Salesforce's Data Cloud, it aims to reduce AI inaccuracies while acknowledging limitations.

articles.title: DO LANGUAGE MODELS REALLY UNDERSTAND THE WORLD?
articles.summary: Researchers looked into how well pretrained language models understand the basic building blocks and rules of the world, like 'a dog is an animal' or 'an apple is a fruit.' They found that these programs are decent at remembering some of this foundational knowledge, but aren't perfect at reasoning with it.

articles.title: DETECTING FAKE VIDEO PARTS WITH UMMAFORMER
articles.summary: With the rise of fake content made by AI, there's a need to spot the specific parts of videos that are altered. The new tool "UMMAFormer" can identify these fake segments in videos more effectively than older methods.

articles.title: ANOMALYGPT: EFFICIENT INDUSTRIAL ANOMALY DETECTION
articles.summary: While big models like MiniGPT-4 are good at understanding images, they struggle with detailed anomalies in industrial settings. This solution, AnomalyGPT, trains these models on simulated anomaly images and their descriptions, and can detect industrial faults without manual adjustments.

articles.title: MAKING TEXT-TO-IMAGE GENERATION SUPER FAST WITH RECTIFIED FLOW (GITHUB
EXLLAMAV2
articles.summary: An inference library for running local LLMs on modern consumer GPUs.

articles.title: [https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.16824v1?utm_source=tldrai]
articles.summary: This research shows that if a model is trained to understand one programming language, it gets better at understanding others too.

articles.title: MODERNA’S CEO ON AI’S POTENTIAL TO CURE CANCER
articles.summary: Moderna CEO Stéphane Bancel reveals the company's extensive use of AI, which predates the ChatGPT era, in drug development, emphasizing its role in creating the COVID-19 vaccine, inventing enzymes, and interacting with regulators.

articles.title: DERIVATIVE WORK
articles.summary: OpenAI has responded to lawsuits from authors who allege ChatGPT was trained on pirated books. Arguing transformative use, the firm seeks dismissal of most claims, comparing the situation to a Google Books copyright case and refuting Digital Millennium Copyright Act violations.

articles.title: REPORT: THE HIDDEN COSTS OF GENERATIVE AI
articles.summary: A survey of 1000 enterprise AI leaders

articles.title: MINUTE READ)
articles.summary: Amazon is launching a new AI tool that generates product listings.
